name: Zhejiang Changsheng Sliding Bearings Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Changsheng Sliding Bearings Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells bearings in China and internationally. It offers metal-polymer composite, bi-metallic composite, bronze wrapped, metallic self-lubricating, and non-metallic self-lubricating bearings, as well as other bearings, such as air compressor swash plates, sintered bearings, steel sleeves, spherical bearings, and solid bronze alloy bearings. Its products are used in engineering machinery, fitness equipment, auto, logistics, mechanical, energy, industry, municipal, and household applications. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Jiashan, China.
